methodology.notes: Evaluated using AllTools retrieval (BM25 + dense OpenAI text-embedding-3-large + sandboxed shell). User simulator: gpt-5.2 with reasoning_effort: low. 4 trials. Seed: 300. Banking_knowledge domain only — other domains intentionally excluded from this comparison; the AllTools setting standardizes retrieval across models. xAI's `-reasoning` model variant (always-on chain-of-thought); launched with `temperature: 0.0` since reasoning is gated by model name on this provider, not by an `effort` parameter.

verification.details: Banking_knowledge domain only, AllTools retrieval. Trajectories suppressed for this preliminary AllTools comparison; raw per-task results retained internally.
